title: rubus aglabratus
intro: Rubus aglabratus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the Rubus genus. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus aglabratus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its high fiber content. Traditional herbal preparations of Rubus aglabratus include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
